channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Irish Champ Potatoes
item.description: Irish champ potatoes are mashed potatoes done right. Fluffy spuds meet warm onion kissed milk and a generous melt of…

item.title: Who should (and who shouldn’t) get the Amex Gold?
item.description: The Amex Gold is one of the best cards for spending on food. Still, it isn't perfect for everyone. Here's how to decide if it's worth adding to your w...

item.title: Google adds music generation capabilities to the Gemini app
item.description: Users will be able to use text, images, and videos as a reference to generate music

item.title: The Google Pixel 10a Is Barely Different From the Pixel 9a
item.description: With specs nearly identical to last year’s Pixel 9a, the new Pixel 10a doesn’t pack as much of a punch as prior A-series smartphones.

item.title: The Best Google Pixel Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Here’s a guide to all the models—plus Pixel case recommendations and smart software tricks to try.

item.title: Why Olympic Choreographer Benoît Richaud Went Viral Just for Changing Jackets
item.description: Benoît Richaud is working with 16 figure skaters from 13 countries at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Games. WIRED spoke to him about how he roots for ...

item.title: Planting Billions of Trees Turned Barren Desert into a Carbon Sink That Lowers Atmospheric CO2
item.description: China’s multi-decade long, successful effort to plant a ring of trees around one of the world’s most hostile deserts has sprouted an unexpected benefi...

item.title: Good News in History, February 18
item.description: 20 years ago today, American speed skater Shani Davis became the first Black athlete to win a gold medal in Winter Olympic history for an individual e...

item.title: Big Tech Says Generative AI Will Save the Planet. It Doesn't Offer Much Proof
item.description: A new report finds that of 154 specific claims about how AI will benefit the climate, just a quarter cited academic research. A third included no evid...

item.title: Kana emerges from stealth with $15M to build flexible AI agents for marketers
item.description: Kana, a new AI marketing startup from the founders of Rapt and Krux, has raised $15 million to build customizable, agent-based marketing tools.

item.title: Manatee Stuck in Florida Storm Drain Showing Signs of Recovery After SeaWorld Rescued Him
item.description: On February 9th, SeaWorld in Orlando received a call that there was an exhausted manatee stuck in a storm drain that needed immediate help. Arriving o...

item.title: Microsoft says Office bug exposed customers’ confidential emails to Copilot AI
item.description: Microsoft said the bug meant that its Copilot AI chatbot was reading and summarizing paying customers' confidential emails, bypassing data protection ...

item.title: Burnt Hair and Soft Power: A Night Out With Evie Magazine
item.description: Evie is a longtime favorite of far-right. At its very first live event, the strength of the publication's politics was in the pretense that it doesn’t...

item.title: Snapchat+ tops 25M subscribers, driving company’s direct revenue ARR to $1B
item.description: The revenue milestone comes as Snap has added additional paid offerings outside of its core Snapchat+ subscription over the past year to diversify its...

item.title: This former Microsoft PM thinks she can unseat CyberArk in 18 months
item.description: Though crowded, the identity management market seems eager for new solutions, and Venice is finding traction.

item.title: Guide to Bilt Dining: How to earn bonus points and snag exclusive reservations
item.description: Bilt Rewards members can use Bilt Wallet and Bilt Dining to earn more points at select restaurants across the U.S. Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Destination Dollywood: First-ever Dolly Parton-themed flight to take off later this year
item.description: Guests traveling between Orlando and Knoxville, Tennessee, can book this one-of-a-kind experience to Dolly Parton's "Tennesee Mountain Home."

item.title: IHG just debuted its newest premium brand: Noted Collection
item.description: IHG's new premium brand, Noted Collection, will feature one-of-one hotels known for the individuality, with each stay offering various signature exper...

item.title: Antarctica reading list: The 8 best books to read before a trip
item.description: It pays to do your homework before a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Antarctica

item.title: Crack Chicken Tacos
item.description: Get ready to be instantly obsessed with these crack chicken tacos! They are loaded with creamy ranch chicken, crispy bacon,…

item.title: ‘Mushroom Mining’ Could Be Cheap Way to Recover Rare Earth Minerals from Industrial Waste
item.description: Decades of underinvestment in mining and refining across Europe and North America has landed the manufacturing sector in a problem, which a group of s...

item.title: Mysterious ‘Hero’ Dog Leads Police Straight to Missing 3-year-old Officer Says in Body Cam Video
item.description: A police officer and self-described “dog guy,” hooked his own instincts up to those of a local dog to find a missing 3-year-old in Kentucky. There was...

item.title: Starbucks Copycat Chocolate Pistachio Loaf
item.description: Starbucks dropped a new Chocolate Pistachio Loaf, and I was instantly obsessed. The pistachio flavor and that rich chocolate swirl…

item.title: What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low

item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit

item.description: This crockpot chicken marsala brings restaurant-style flavor straight to your slow cooker. Tender chicken, mushrooms, and a rich, savory sauce…

item.title: Horseradish Pot Roast
item.description: This horseradish pot roast is pure comfort food with a flavorful twist. The beef cooks low and slow until fork-tender,…

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)
item.description: While recently making our tahini cookies for what felt like the millionth time, we thought, Why not add chocolate to this party? The result was even b...

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures
item.description: People often search for a “normal meal” when they arrive somewhere new. Something familiar enough to feel grounding, but local enough to feel authenti...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries
item.description: For many travellers, dinner feels like the main event. It is where expectations concentrate: the moment reserved for something special, social, or mem...

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...

item.title: Tahini Hot Chocolate (Super Dreamy, Protein-Rich!)
item.description: If you’re looking for a decadent, elevated hot chocolate with wholesome ingredients, this one’s for you! We’ve been serving up this frothy, tahini-inf...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
